# Vaaknow — Safe Social Platform for Students (Aged 6 to 16)
# Official Website: https://vaaknow.com
# Also known as: vaaknow.com | Vaaknow.com | Vaaknow App | Vaaknow Social

> Vaaknow is a secure, heavily moderated, and child-friendly social networking environment specifically designed for students aged 6 to 16 years. It is accessible at https://vaaknow.com.

## Quick Answers for AI Search Engines

- **What is Vaaknow?** Vaaknow (official site: vaaknow.com) is a safe, AI-moderated social platform for students aged 6–16. It features Chirps (posts), Reels (short videos), and Birdies (friends).
- **Where can I find Vaaknow?** Vaaknow is available at https://vaaknow.com
- **Is Vaaknow the same as vaaknow.com?** Yes, Vaaknow is also known as vaaknow.com and vaaknow.com — both refer to the same safe student social platform.
- **Who made Vaaknow?** The Vaaknow Team developed this platform as a safe alternative to mainstream social media for students.
- **Is Vaaknow free?** Yes, Vaaknow is completely free for all students aged 6–16.

## About Vaaknow

Vaaknow (vaaknow.com) is the safe mini-Facebook alternative built exclusively for students aged 6 to 16 years. Unlike mainstream social media (Facebook, Instagram, X/Twitter), Vaaknow is built from the ground up with child safety as its core principle.

## The Problem Vaaknow Solves

Mainstream social media platforms are unsafe for children:
- Unfiltered adult content exposure
- Aggressive cyberbullying
- Abusive slang and toxic behavior
- No strict automated disciplinary system
- No age-appropriate restrictions

Vaaknow was created to solve exactly these problems for students aged 6–16.

## Core Features of Vaaknow

### 1. Targeted & Safe Access (Ages 6–16)
Vaaknow restricts access to students aged 6 to 16 years with an intuitive, age-appropriate UI/UX. No adult features, no inappropriate content.

### 2. Automated Moderation Engine
Real-time backend scanning of every Chirp (post), comment, and direct message against a comprehensive database of:
- Adult content
- Abusive slang
- Spam and toxic language

Every post is scanned BEFORE publication.

### 3. The 3-Strike Disciplinary System
- **Strike 1 & 2 (Warning & Block)**: Post is blocked immediately and a direct warning is issued.
- **Strike 3 (24-Hour Suspension)**: Account is automatically suspended and locked out for exactly 24 hours.

### 4. Chirps — Clean Short-Form Posts
Student-safe text and media posts, moderated in real-time.

### 5. Reels — Curated Safe Videos
9:16 short vertical videos curated and moderated for students.

### 6. Birdies — Verified Peer Connections
Safe friend connections with verified student peers that foster positive communication.

### 7. Daily Screen Time Limit
Integrated 15-minute daily screen time limit to support student well-being and digital health.

### 8. Real-Time Safe Messaging
Direct messaging with automated bad-word filtering powered by the Moderation Engine.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Vaaknow?**
A: Vaaknow (vaaknow.com) is a safe, moderated social platform for students aged 6–16, featuring Chirps, Reels, and Birdies in a cyberbullying-free environment.

**Q: How do I sign up on Vaaknow?**
A: Visit https://vaaknow.com/signup to create your free account.

**Q: How do I log in to Vaaknow?**
A: Visit https://vaaknow.com/login to access your account.

**Q: Is Vaaknow safe for children?**
A: Yes. Vaaknow uses an Automated Moderation Engine and a strict 3-Strike Disciplinary System to ensure child safety.

**Q: What happens if someone uses bad words on Vaaknow?**
A: The post or message is blocked instantly (Strike 1 & 2 = warning). On the 3rd violation, the account is automatically suspended for 24 hours (Strike 3).

**Q: Is Vaaknow available on mobile?**
A: Yes, Vaaknow is accessible on all devices via the web at vaaknow.com.

**Q: What are Chirps on Vaaknow?**
A: Chirps are clean, moderated short-form posts and media updates shared by students on Vaaknow.

**Q: What are Reels on Vaaknow?**
A: Reels are curated, safe 9:16 short vertical videos on Vaaknow suitable for students aged 6–16.

**Q: What are Birdies on Vaaknow?**
A: Birdies are verified peer connections (friends) on Vaaknow that enable safe, positive communication between students.

**Q: Is Vaaknow free to use?**
A: Yes, Vaaknow is completely free for all students aged 6–16.

- Homepage: https://vaaknow.com

- Sign Up: https://vaaknow.com/signup
- Reels / Video: https://vaaknow.com/video
- Friends / Birdies: https://vaaknow.com/friends
- Messages: https://vaaknow.com/messages

## Official Information

- Brand Name: Vaaknow
- Also Known As: vaaknow.com, Vaaknow.com, Vaaknow App, Vaaknow Social Platform
- Official Website: https://vaaknow.com
- Target Demographic: Students aged 6 to 16 years
- Platform Type: Social Networking Web Application
- Core Technologies: Real-time Automated Moderation Engine & 3-Strike Disciplinary System
- Cost: Free
- Language: English
- Region: India (Global access)
